data.name: Hentai Memorama
data.detailed_description:
Memory game where you have to find all pairs of cards to complete each level by discovering an image.

Each level will be more complex than the previous one and will bring new challenges to your memory.

You can unlock new cards as you progress through the game.

The last game mode will take your memory to the maximum.
data.about_the_game:
Memory game where you have to find all pairs of cards to complete each level by discovering an image.

Each level will be more complex than the previous one and will bring new challenges to your memory.

You can unlock new cards as you progress through the game.

The last game mode will take your memory to the maximum.
data.short_description: Memory game with a nice challenge and a happy ending
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 日文, 俄文, 法文, 德文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 150 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 150 MB 可用空間
